ariaSpec.usage: Specifies the role of non selectable ListView content element.
Specifies the role of selectable ListView content element.
Specifies the role of each item in a non selectable ListView.
Specifies the role of each item in a selectable ListView.
Specifies the total number of items present in the ListView.
Specifies the position of the current item in the entire list.
The first item in the ListView must be focusable by default.

kbSpec.behavior: Moves the focus to the next rendered item. If the focus is on the last item, the focus does not move.
Moves the focus to the next rendered item. If the focus is on the last item, the focus does not move.
Moves the focus to the previous rendered item. If the focus is on the first item, the focus does not move.
Moves the focus to the previous rendered item. If the focus is on the first item, the focus does not move.
Moves the focus to the first rendered item.
Moves the focus to the last rendered item.
When there are focusable items within a ListView item - the focus moves to the first focusable item inside.
If the focus is on an element inside a ListView item - returns the focus back to the ListView item.
